div.p: Create a draft roster as soon as a season registration has been confirmed, or reopen the roster that already exists.

table.caption: Season registrations that can be converted into portal-managed rosters.
Rosters available to the current portal representative.

div.p: No rosters are available for your club yet.

div.div: No current blocking issues are recorded.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap mb-2 gap-2

table.caption: Players currently attached to this roster.

button.onclick: return confirm('Remove this player from the roster?')

div.div: No players have been added to this roster yet.

table.caption: Audit history entries recorded for this roster.

option.t-att-selected: line and line.license_id == license and 'selected' or None

input.name: is_captain
input.t-att-checked: line and line.is_captain and 'checked' or None

input.name: is_vice_captain
input.t-att-checked: line and line.is_vice_captain and 'checked' or None

table.caption: Match sheets available for match-day preparation.

div.p: No match sheets are available for your club yet.

div.t-if: not sheet.readiness_feedback and not sheet.match_id.result_contest_reason and not sheet.match_id.result_correction_reason

div.label: Roster *

option.t-att-selected: sheet.roster_id and sheet.roster_id.id == roster.id and 'selected' or None

div.div: No active or draft rosters found for this team. Please create and activate a roster first.
Only active or draft rosters for this team are shown. An active roster is required for submission.

option.t-att-selected: sheet.coach_id and sheet.coach_id.id == rep.id and 'selected' or None

t.div: No registered coaches found for this club.

option.t-att-selected: sheet.manager_id and sheet.manager_id.id == rep.id and 'selected' or None

t.div: No registered representatives found for this club.

div.span: Select a roster in the preparation form above to manage the squad.

div.p: Check each player to include them in the match-day squad. Players come from the linked roster.

table.caption: Roster players available for match-day squad selection.

option.t-att-selected: (sl and sl.is_starter or (not sl and True)) and 'selected' or None
sl and sl.is_substitute and 'selected' or None
sl and not sl.is_starter and not sl.is_substitute and 'selected' or None

input.t-att-checked: sl and sl.is_captain and 'checked' or None

form.div: No players on the linked roster yet.

table.caption: Match-day squad submission lines for this sheet.

div.div: No players have been added to this match sheet yet.

table.caption: Participation audit events recorded for this match sheet.
Result audit events linked to this match.
Match-day preparation queue for the current portal representative.

div.p: No scheduled match-day sheets are currently assigned to you.
